document.name: regulator-tn-doi — Regulatory Subpoena / Litigation Event Emitter (parameterized)

metadata.description: Integration Service API Workflow for source_system 'regulator-tn-doi' (Tennessee Department of Insurance). PARAMETERIZED on input 'event_type': 'regulatory-subpoena' (Reversal 3, the HERO fan-spawn at t+150s, schema regulatory-subpoena.json-schema.json) vs 'litigation-event' (Reversal 5 co-defendant beat at t+260s, schema litigation-event.json-schema.json). The regulator workflow doubles as the litigation event source in the compressed demo timeline. DEPLOY-TIME NOTE: the live Data Fabric read (RegulatorTemplate entity) and the Maestro Trigger emission are wired at deploy via 'uip api-workflow registry stub' against a live tenant. Here both payloads are shaped from workflow inputs (Data Fabric defaults) by JavaScript/Assign activities; the connector read is NOT hand-authored.

legal_basis.default: Tennessee Insurance Holding Company System Act, examination authority

script.code: return { event_type: 'litigation-event', source_system: 'regulator-tn-doi', simulated_day: $workflow.input.simulated_day, event_subtype: $workflow.input.event_subtype, named_parties: $workflow.input.named_parties, clearflow_named_co_defendant: $workflow.input.clearflow_named_co_defendant, theory: $workflow.input.theory, privilege_reshuffle_required: $workflow.input.privilege_reshuffle_required };

Response_Litigation.response: ${{ event_type: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildLitigation.event_type, source_system: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildLitigation.source_system, simulated_day: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildLitigation.simulated_day, event_subtype: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildLitigation.event_subtype, named_parties: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildLitigation.named_parties, clearflow_named_co_defendant: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildLitigation.clearflow_named_co_defendant, theory: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildLitigation.theory, privilege_reshuffle_required: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildLitigation.privilege_reshuffle_required }}

script.code: return { event_type: 'regulatory-subpoena', source_system: 'regulator-tn-doi', simulated_day: $workflow.input.simulated_day, regulator_id: 'tn-doi', template_id: 'tn-doi-subpoena-2026', scope: $workflow.input.scope, named_provider_ids: $workflow.input.named_provider_ids, response_deadline_days: $workflow.input.response_deadline_days, legal_basis: $workflow.input.legal_basis };

Response_Subpoena.response: ${{ event_type: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildSubpoena.event_type, source_system: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildSubpoena.source_system, simulated_day: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildSubpoena.simulated_day, regulator_id: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildSubpoena.regulator_id, template_id: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildSubpoena.template_id, scope: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildSubpoena.scope, named_provider_ids: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildSubpoena.named_provider_ids, response_deadline_days: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildSubpoena.response_deadline_days, legal_basis: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildSubpoena.legal_basis }}
